revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
'Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024' 'second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024'
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {| class="toc" {{#ifeq:{{{alignright|}}}|yes|align="right"}} ! {{#if:{{yesno|{{{help|yes}}}}}|Click on "►" below to display subcategories:}} |- | {{#tag: categorytree| {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|depth={{{depth|0}}}}}<!-- the following ifexist is just to add a backlink to the main category, so that the page using this template will show up in "What links here" from the category -->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}} |}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]<!-- PLEASE ADD THIS TEMPLATE'S CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{| class="toc" {{#ifeq:{{{alignright|}}}|yes|align="right"}} ! {{#if:{{yesno|{{{help|yes}}}}}|Click on "►" below to display subcategories:}} |- | {{#tag: categorytree| {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|depth={{{depth|0}}}}}<!-- the following ifexist is just to add a backlink to the main category, so that the page using this template will show up in "What links here" from the category -->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}} |}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]<!-- PLEASE ADD THIS TEMPLATE'S CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_tree here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_tree for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {| class="toc" {{#ifeq:{{{alignright|}}}|yes|align="right"}} ! {{#if:{{yesno|{{{help|yes}}}}}|Click on "►" below to display subcategories:}} |- | {{#tag: categorytree| {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|depth={{{depth|0}}}}}<!-- the following ifexist is just to add a backlink to the main category, so that the page using this template will show up in "What links here" from the category -->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}} |}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]<!-- PLEASE ADD THIS TEMPLATE'S CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: tag page without wikidata link [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24868302939|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_tree for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {| class="toc" {{#ifeq:{{{alignright|}}}|yes|align="right"}} ! {{#if:{{yesno|{{{help|yes}}}}}|Click on "►" below to display subcategories:}} |- | {{#tag: categorytree| {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|depth={{{depth|0}}}}}<!-- the following ifexist is just to add a backlink to the main category, so that the page using this template will show up in "What links here" from the category -->{{#ifexist:Category:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}} |}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]<!-- PLEASE ADD THIS TEMPLATE'S CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude> [[Category:Pages without wikidata]]
